name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: Pray the Vote, Election Integrity Hotline + more!
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2769)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | With Election Day quickly approaching, we can look back today at our worst predictions and see that many of them are playing out right now. We have seen widespread election fraud beyond mail in voting, including the removal of signature verification standards, the removal of postmark standards, vote harvesting, the striking down of voter ID provisions in certain states, and more. Today there are over 400 lawsuits related to this election!

True the Vote has taken legal action in states like Michigan, Montana, Nevada, New Mexico, Texas, and Virginia, and Texas. We are also pointing out ways that citizens can help continue to engage in these next 10 days leading up to Election Day. Pray, work, vote!

This week we kicked off [Pray the Vote](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2791) – the largest interactive election prayer initiative in history. Over 5 million Americans have prayed over the election so far! We also launched an [Election Integrity Hotline](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2773) – a 24/7, bilingual resource to support election workers, poll watchers, and voters during this unprecedented time – which you can reach at 855-702-0702. We are all citizen watchdogs so keep this number in your phone and reach out if you think you've witnessed fraud or manipulation.

Check out [truethevote.org](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2792) for more information on our latest efforts, and watch and subscribe to our [LIVE SHOW](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2793) on our YouTube channel – we'll be live every day at 5:00 pm CT / 6:00 pm ET. We cannot let our guards down now! We must remain vigilant as we head into the most important election in American history.

Onward!
Catherine Engelbrecht
---
| |
---
|
---
| | OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED, WHITE & TRUE:
---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2774)
---
| | | NEW EPISODE:
EP. 23 | Pray, Work, Vote!
[Watch Now](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2794)

Subscribe to the podcast today to get notified as soon as new episodes post:

---
| | CATCH UP ON PREVIOUS PODCAST EPISODES:
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | EP. 22 | The Signal, the Noise, the Election, and YOU
---
| | | [Watch Now](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2775)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | EP. 21 | Meltdown, Montana, Militias, Physics, and The Election
---
| | | [Watch Now](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2778)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | EP. 20 | Brace for Impact! Malice and Forethought in the 2020 Election
---
| | | [Watch Now](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2779)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | IN THE NEWS
---
| | | |
---
| | TRUE THE VOTE LAUNCHES ELECTION INTEGRITY HOTLINE
We are all citizen watchdogs and True the Vote is working harder than ever to make sure you have the tools you need to help protect our election process from fraud and exploitation. We launched an [Election Integrity Hotline](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2773) – a 24/7, bilingual resource to support election workers, poll watchers, and voters. This hotline is in addition to our Election Integrity Report which you can also always access on our website.
---
| | [ LEARN MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2773)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | TRUE THE VOTE ENCOURAGES MILLIONS OF AMERICANS TO PRAY FOR THE ELECTION
As early voting continues, True the Vote, together with Intercessors for America, launched the [Pray the Vote Project](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2791), the largest interactive election prayer initiative in history. Pray the Vote guides Americans to unite in prayer for the election through an engaging online experience, including an interactive map displaying ballot processing center locations across the nation.
---
| | [ LEARN MORE
](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2795)
---
| | |
---
| | TRUE THE VOTE ENCOURAGES CITIZENS TO PRAY, WORK, VOTE!
In this episode of the podcast, Catherine Engelbrecht revisits her very first podcast back in May 2020 with General Counsel Jim Bopp and looks back at our past predictions – many of which are playing out right now in this election. There are now over 400 lawsuits! Catherine also highlights several states where True the Vote has taken legal action and points out ways that citizens can help us push back with Election Day right around the corner.
---
| | [ WATCH ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2775)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | EPOCH TIMES FEATURE: "TRUE THE VOTE FIGHTS FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY IN TROUBLED TIMES"
"As courts and government officials across the nation relax voting rules in response to the pandemic, the nation's foremost electoral integrity group, True the Vote, is fighting to protect the sanctity of the ballot box in the Nov. 3 elections, its founder said in an exclusive interview."
---
| | [ READ MORE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=277A625A20A2797)

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK | | With Election Day quickly approaching, we can look back today at our worst predictions and see that many of them are playing out right now. We have seen widespread election fraud beyond mail in voting, including the removal of signature verification standards, the removal of postmark standards, vote harvesting, the striking down of voter ID provisions in certain states, and more. Today there are over 400 lawsuits related to this election! True the Vote has taken legal action in states like Michigan, Montana, Nevada, New Mexico, Texas, and Virginia, and Texas. We are also pointing out ways that citizens can help continue to engage in these next 10 days leading up to Election Day. Pray, work, vote! This week we kicked off – the largest interactive election prayer initiative in history. Over 5 million Americans have prayed over the election so far! We also launched an – a 24/7, bilingual resource to support election workers, poll watchers, and voters during this unprecedented time – which you can reach at 855-702-0702. We are all citizen watchdogs so keep this number in your phone and reach out if you think you've witnessed fraud or manipulation. Check out for more information on our latest efforts, and watch and subscribe to our on our YouTube channel – we'll be live every day at 5:00 pm CT / 6:00 pm ET. We cannot let our guards down now! We must remain vigilant as we head into the most important election in American history. Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht | | | | | OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED, WHITE & TRUE: | | | | | | | NEW EPISODE: EP. 23 | Pray, Work, Vote! Subscribe to the podcast today to get notified as soon as new episodes post: | | | | | | | | CATCH UP ON PREVIOUS PODCAST EPISODES: | | | | | | | EP. 22 | The Signal, the Noise, the Election, and YOU | | | | | | | | | | EP. 21 | Meltdown, Montana, Militias, Physics, and The Election | | | | | | | | | | EP. 20 | Brace for Impact! Malice and Forethought in the 2020 Election | | | | | | | | IN THE NEWS | | | | | | TRUE THE VOTE LAUNCHES ELECTION INTEGRITY HOTLINE We are all citizen watchdogs and True the Vote is working harder than ever to make sure you have the tools you need to help protect our election process from fraud and exploitation. We launched an – a 24/7, bilingual resource to support election workers, poll watchers, and voters. This hotline is in addition to our Election Integrity Report which you can also always access on our website. | | | | | | | | | TRUE THE VOTE ENCOURAGES MILLIONS OF AMERICANS TO PRAY FOR THE ELECTION As early voting continues, True the Vote, together with Intercessors for America, launched the , the largest interactive election prayer initiative in history. Pray the Vote guides Americans to unite in prayer for the election through an engaging online experience, including an interactive map displaying ballot processing center locations across the nation. | | | | | | | TRUE THE VOTE ENCOURAGES CITIZENS TO PRAY, WORK, VOTE! In this episode of the podcast, Catherine Engelbrecht revisits her very first podcast back in May 2020 with General Counsel Jim Bopp and looks back at our past predictions – many of which are playing out right now in this election. There are now over 400 lawsuits! Catherine also highlights several states where True the Vote has taken legal action and points out ways that citizens can help us push back with Election Day right around the corner. | | | | | | | | | EPOCH TIMES FEATURE: "TRUE THE VOTE FIGHTS FOR ELECTION INTEGRITY IN TROUBLED TIMES" "As courts and government officials across the nation relax voting rules in response to the pandemic, the nation's foremost electoral integrity group, True the Vote, is fighting to protect the sanctity of the ballot box in the Nov. 3 elections, its founder said in an exclusive interview." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

name: Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt Takes Debate Stage, Fletcher Hides
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Hunt Takes The Debate Stage
While His Opponent Hides
Houston, TX - Yesterday evening, Wesley Hunt, the Republican nominee in Texas'
7th Congressional District, took the stage for a scheduled, non-partisan debate
despite his opponent's refusal to participate. Congresswoman Fletcher's
absence is an unwelcome reminder that her loyalties lie not with the people of
this District, but with Nancy Pelosi and her own political self-interest.

In an effort to give voters the transparency they deserve, the Hunt campaign
made multiple efforts to schedule a debate with Fletcher. Yet at every turn,
Fletcher declined to cooperate. Nevertheless, Hunt was determined to give 7th
District voters the accountability and visibility they deserve. Hunt therefore
accepted the invitation from the non-partisan Mayors of the Memorial Villages
to participate in a candidate forum and field questions pertaining to his
policy positions and the issues important to the 7th District.

"This race is about giving the people of the 7th District the advocate they
deserve. And that necessitates giving voters access to open debate so they are
properly equipped to make their decision at the ballot box," said Hunt. "While
I am disappointed in my opponent's unwillingness to engage in an open,
televised debate, I will not allow her abdication of leadership prevent voters
from getting answers on the issues they care about. Fletcher's actions are an
unfortunate reminder that she is more interested in toeing the party line and
appeasing Nancy Pelosi than she is in responding honestly to the questions and
concerns of her voters. I'd like to thank the six mayors of the Memorial
Villages for hosting this event. I appreciated the opportunity to answer their
questions this evening."

Hunt first reached out to Congresswoman Fletcher to extend multiple debate
invitations in August. After Hunt received no response from Fletcher, a
non-partisan news organization extended an invitation to both candidates to
debate in an open, televised setting just two blocks from Fletcher's home.
Again, Fletcher was unwilling to cooperate. And then, when a non-partisan
coalition of Memorial Village Mayors extended an invitation to both candidates
to debate with a non-partisan moderator, Fletcher again refused.
###

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=955fc32a06604902be838ca30f8b51ae&_t=F5OVh01Tkb656efCv6rq2-P6mra8EhEFJga7jhGMZYlLfaNZJI3_Z-LQIG-rn1_r56IkNAfDllBIRirLqistI1fZr_nbrXn495ussE1kZIrCrlM1-mbwS_BA12-dcobOO-koCsHLhWezbtJOIL5HlVs5MDMcRDJofYHWdgVJXRw%3D>
.

| Peter, 🚨 BREAKING: This morning, Abigail was endorsed by the Washington Post Editorial Board, who recognized her **bipartisan approach to legislating** and her **assertive, independent leadership for VA-07. ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hgaDpvj5mhc4fpBRjdCijrTif1GXmlsqYmCVeLDFIjw=/8trDTOfd1I5FU_CCGFBJQnyTXnuRK10oHAxlXWkHxaA=) One of our favorite sections: _**Ms. Spanberger deserves to be reelected. Not only is she a standard-bearer of moderation at a time it is badly needed; she is also a thoughtful, knowledgeable legislator who has taken the trouble to legislate. That sets her apart in a body that tilts toward grandstanding and ideological flame-throwing.**_ [_**We couldn 't agree more, and it's absolutely urgent that we keep a thoughtful, knowledgeable legislator like Abigail in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hgaDpvj5mhc4fpBRjdCijrTif1GXmlsqYmCVeLDFIjw=/8trDTOfd1I5FU_CCGFBJQnyTXnuRK10oHAxlXWkHxaA=) This is a huge endorsement that shows how Abigail, and the work she's done, are receiving national recognition for her work on behalf of Central Virginia's communities. **We have the momentum in this race, but we can 't rest until we've won. ** We're just 10 days out from the most important election of our lifetime. The stakes this year couldn't be higher for the people of VA-07 and for this country. As the Editorial board writes: _**" Ms. Spanberger has been an independent voice for Virginia's 7th District. Mr. Freitas would be the opposite. If she loses, so will the district's constituents."**_ The people of Central Virginia need a strong leader like Abigail fighting for them. [_**Will you make a contribution right now to keep Abigail 's strong, honest voice in Congress?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hgaDpvj5mhc4fpBRjdCijrTif1GXmlsqYmCVeLDFIjw=/8trDTOfd1I5FU_CCGFBJQnyTXnuRK10oHAxlXWkHxaA=) | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/hgaDpvj5mhc4fpBRjdCijrTif1GXmlsqYmCVeLDFIjw=/8trDTOfd1I5FU_CCGFBJQnyTXnuRK10oHAxlXWkHxaA=)

clean_body: Peter, First – I want to be crystal clear that I am SO thankful for all the support these past months. As I have gotten to know so many friends (new AND old) and neighbors, I have really come to appreciate more than before the incredible patriotism and sense of duty of the men and women of this district. We are fighting for the future of the American Dream during this incredibly historic election. The line is clear – socialism on the left, freedom and prosperity on the right. In honor of our 10-day countdown to Election Day, a special conservative group is doing a 6x match on every donation that comes in between now and November 3rd. I am now asking you one more time to chip in and help my campaign to finish strong. Time is short, and we will only have one shot at this historically consequential election. Are you with us? Thanks, Jim Oberweis | | Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee id:2020-10-15-19:47:34:435t

name: John Cornyn

228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lP_5yxbRUIEDGnnZLAj0TuYP-PzPzFkLGm-17UTS3EV4ajW4TW8BogE8pV8jZybUVOzUpnWTLRTNCNR3WfFGvH9rjs21DVKfZsf01zbbGNJdeKkPAIXwXxnEXjAwQcrEcJd6cRFXWoXIo7eqPiZcReV38fYodXZx602OydG9h1E=&c=v3dN8zAYnO_wpQhLo5WXW8t3-yOzEHBNXFfoIyi31NKL1q14trhf7w==&ch=x5VM8u97-CA1ffd-geIiZPI_ol9CZtVbXMzDenPjc3BCsBtz15AO6w==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lP_5yxbRUIEDGnnZLAj0TuYP-PzPzFkLGm-17UTS3EV4ajW4TW8BooC3fKl9sOF2E3lbIw7gSsHxWA5_pAevvlv1W7cG6_xvXn0F3FcASo3Q8SI1zm9dbZe7BrplW9vNPH5nzqVWpKqGJs_L7XZdkvKHYtmvX3dC&c=v3dN8zAYnO_wpQhLo5WXW8t3-yOzEHBNXFfoIyi31NKL1q14trhf7w==&ch=x5VM8u97-CA1ffd-geIiZPI_ol9CZtVbXMzDenPjc3BCsBtz15AO6w==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lP_5yxbRUIEDGnnZLAj0TuYP-PzPzFkLGm-17UTS3EV4ajW4TW8BogE8pV8jZybUJpZdaHEjLEIv28Il4PlRl3xz6cnMX0vK9zJnBFxbNEhdckmkBFaW2IPbpfRtxUE8D-cVIGTqW8nTHoWsMeHTh7ZD0nEiSXskv0pyOJcKLYcgR8sjNm2_9w==&c=v3dN8zAYnO_wpQhLo5WXW8t3-yOzEHBNXFfoIyi31NKL1q14trhf7w==&ch=x5VM8u97-CA1ffd-geIiZPI_ol9CZtVbXMzDenPjc3BCsBtz15AO6w==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lP_5yxbRUIEDGnnZLAj0TuYP-PzPzFkLGm-17UTS3EV4ajW4TW8BouDElNLO4NPMKR6US9hWwUoSbWL0mYEVpEFQwpqJ_BRDlxKzhthms5V-xl01ovn8LDWxiO37o281_EgENRxPOMUy-uVOyN1hGajVrAGApO0FL6YzfysTRcGZxVq53Z5eAv75_YXr9ylmT2yHbb35XcKRyzPbemntxfjYMjDo2ISkMCxR0QGxUCLdfud8JoZqr2gjk-rp8oVhk3RRIADDApJnNxBwKoRWYFn5DEiM9qQ3P2_Jd0miGdfyFdwHyMmrqA==&c=v3dN8zAYnO_wpQhLo5WXW8t3-yOzEHBNXFfoIyi31NKL1q14trhf7w==&ch=x5VM8u97-CA1ffd-geIiZPI_ol9CZtVbXMzDenPjc3BCsBtz15AO6w==) and find out exactly how you can help. name: Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director
subject: $10 for 10 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Hi Derek.

I think the subject line says it all here -- we're 10 days away from Election Day, and I'm about to ask you to consider chipping in $10 to Mark Warner's campaign.

**_You might be asking yourself: "What can $10 do if we're just 10 days away from Election Day?"_**

I get it -- we're in the home stretch and I know it's hard to see the good that your donation is doing for this campaign. As the digital director, I see it firsthand. Every dollar you chip in, even this late in the game, helps us to be nimble with our digital strategy.

You're helping our team reach more voters across the Commonwealth with ads on social media, Snapchat, and online news outlets. And you're letting us put more money behind the ads that are already working for us online -- which means we can reach more voters in these critical final days before the election.

**[So, if you've seen an ad for Mark Warner in your newsfeed over the last couple of months, I hope you'll consider chipping in $10 to make sure your neighbors and friends can see them too.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da08/53d9897e/557f1d7d/1c88fe6f/3287273072/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-helpneighbors?refcode=20201024_f_1_nd__898__&refcode2=ask1&amount=10")**

Thank you for everything you've done -- and everything you will do -- to support this campaign. We couldn't do this without your support.

Thank you,

Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da08/53d9897e/557f1d7d/1c88fe6e/3287273072/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-helpneighbors?refcode=20201024_f_1_nd__898__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

Friend,

My Democrat opponent Lizzie Fletcher's record on the energy industry speaks for itself.

Despite promising voters in 2018 that she'd protect our valuable energy jobs, she...

* ❌ _Allowed Nancy Pelosi to STRIP funding for Houston 's energy sector_

---
This is why she doesn't want to face me on the debate stage. She doesn't want you to hear about her job-killing record after voting with Pelosi 99% of the time.

**_But we will hold her accountable in just 9 DAYS by choosing to send someone else to Congress who will ALWAYS put Texas FIRST._**

[**Please make a contribution today to fire Lizzie Fletcher and send U.S. Army Captain Wesley Hunt to Congress who will PROTECT Texas jobs.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00112mJ2v6B70Xh2ylA7fYtNSXX-Cr4q2YCv0MRXIfa-JQjqGeKPp85WfzwgnMmuVJWfIfhgblVAcRglQpp0wiydE1yVV9_LEkdSDLznL0a4Uf_K8VAqou3a_N0bB7W0UhAxlyP9psIyDgvIdlZIT-SpBpUgtKcGd6S9TAfLBpnOOO1c03QquKsE6hZzt-x2J9vljgpBkAHHwTDPB1m-PdYvc24RTLQb9FZNbj4pHs51hVDPCdecbH620KHiGjn5vfzYLsViR-_X1IujKGlaExK3B9dKFRkQxT5yDhXnC12JSUcxZOKnF4wSA==&c=IPdgp44doyo-ZX20Iqsghlls9T051y8WeupQlhK0uJSPY7m7nf02gA==&ch=aEgKUx_IVNLHuwgBfMhDFKthSSv6QKlR7Jf2ngvbX62nvELPx-ahkA==)

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Senator Cory Booker joins national leaders and endorses Nina Ahmad for Pa Auditor General.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , With only eleven days left in this election - one of the most consequential in recent history - we have to do everything possible to get voters to turn out and vote. My team and I have been working around the clock, to make sure our message reaches every community and every voter in the Commonwealth. #LeaveNoOneLeftBehind. This past week, NJ Senator Cory Booker endorsed my candidacy for Auditor General. I am beyond honored to have earned the endorsement of this trailblazing leader. Senator Booker sets the standard on what it means to be for and of the people and I look forward to living up to the example he continues to set. I am honored that Senator Booker joins many national leaders like President Obama, Vice President Biden, Senator Kamala Harris, Mayor Pete Buttigieg, Andrew Yang in supporting my candidacy! Will you join them in getting me across the finish line? [**Can you please help me today with $5**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uEeOxNauyAr-ZQvK4rJLXmzDm7hpjDdFU3HVP7X80rQ=/w7qNw9szU7uS68zRVRYxfD3HZPBXgUus75t7CkYcJcM=)[**,******](https://act.myngp.com/el/uEeOxNauyAr-ZQvK4rJLXmzDm7hpjDdFU3HVP7X80rQ=/w7qNw9szU7uS68zRVRYxfD3HZPBXgUus75t7CkYcJcM=)[**$10, $20.20 or $100? Humbly Yours,
Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/uEeOxNauyAr-ZQvK4rJLXmzDm7hpjDdFU3HVP7X80rQ=/r_ARGP29NBgMv99wKMHm9YazF9_wr83jxbi3XSmv_40=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uEeOxNauyAr-ZQvK4rJLXmzDm7hpjDdFU3HVP7X80rQ=/w7qNw9szU7uS68zRVRYxfD3HZPBXgUus75t7CkYcJcM=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uEeOxNauyAr-ZQvK4rJLXmzDm7hpjDdFU3HVP7X80rQ=/GnX3LGLFqmZK6HYyIaWAI1aj2CwXUyYzmrisqfLFm8A=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uEeOxNauyAr-ZQvK4rJLXmzDm7hpjDdFU3HVP7X80rQ=/yCUQbZnJkbLhzYHTJKkpZHKzDnJz5RtB-v_5UDoVLFs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uEeOxNauyAr-ZQvK4rJLXmzDm7hpjDdFU3HVP7X80rQ=/c03tHVr6QUwK_94n-5_JCwvk736NqtnuCy-2D7NVu5Y=?hl=en)

name: Carlos Gimenez
subject: Here Are The Facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlos Gimenez for Congress
body:
We have a record to be proud of, %%First Name%%, and now it's time to bring this record of results to Congress.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AzPrNStuuL5LBTUf15Ku3TybBBHS2GPkHUg7lqcTWtafngcVVZwwcFfZ65-IT-M3uFOwOe3I_aZhUdry9G3aFNgSCBgAgIkiVv0FCpNnGUYyDao6AT4jKlpFXVVeEhrJA40nriSvmwJuCGCAM2r1SwmcfYbHGV4wQ7ioRMUq_InotxLAWMlZNhC297ezjMGnQTDgh_gCbIsw2HuF09NM0tbHxCG2OaFshxoP_VxiGy2-FQK0qNLs96KuyL0ZSVv_EpVUNg7WV_oVxcwGuLOO1jVRyBBfX3DCfVQf5jAWe17iyswsUWpZGsZxngr5BuS26cCS-oLVtPZ-pCes0h_Kij975ywHEyibYPGn7bvvZf2vucWstCpxbcXRlHrga6Jz5KnN-ej8ZgSUCUUmVlSc63am_FUDQeWNuYdypRvZCCXasNDerxxjtQ==&c=0W_r3772qsEkiUBY9aQyC11MNS3BpkIIvf-RwsPX0bB8_36KOl5f8w==&ch=qW33XwyaIMVqndU32xZQmfo337UeLIe5aQh-5SFyWqu1o0UYyq_K4Q==) **Here are the facts:**
* **The general election is in just 10 Days**
* Our liberal opponent is lining up every dollar she can against us
* It's up to us to take her on.

As Mayor of Miami-Dade County, I took on special interests and raging partisanship to fight for those who mattered: hardworking South Floridians who feel their government is failing to work for **THEM**.

**And I 'm proud of what we accomplished:**
* I balanced a budget of $8.9 billion **8 YEARS in a ROW.**
* Cut taxes by **$1,700 PER HOUSEHOLD.**
* Fought for **transparency and accountability.**
* Saved the taxpayers **$400,000,000.00+** in wasteful spending.
* Dropped unemployment from **10% to BELOW 2%.**
* **Led one of the STRONGEST economic comebacks in American history.**

And the results are clear: Miami-Dade County is more prosperous, ready to take on the challenges of the 21st Century, and **ready to lead the nation in opportunity and growth.**
[HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AzPrNStuuL5LBTUf15Ku3TybBBHS2GPkHUg7lqcTWtafngcVVZwwcFfZ65-IT-M3uFOwOe3I_aZhUdry9G3aFNgSCBgAgIkiVv0FCpNnGUYyDao6AT4jKlpFXVVeEhrJA40nriSvmwJuCGCAM2r1SwmcfYbHGV4wQ7ioRMUq_InotxLAWMlZNhC297ezjMGnQTDgh_gCbIsw2HuF09NM0tbHxCG2OaFshxoP_VxiGy2-FQK0qNLs96KuyL0ZSVv_EpVUNg7WV_oVxcwGuLOO1jVRyBBfX3DCfVQf5jAWe17iyswsUWpZGsZxngr5BuS26cCS-oLVtPZ-pCes0h_Kij975ywHEyibYPGn7bvvZf2vucWstCpxbcXRlHrga6Jz5KnN-ej8ZgSUCUUmVlSc63am_FUDQeWNuYdypRvZCCXasNDerxxjtQ==&c=0W_r3772qsEkiUBY9aQyC11MNS3BpkIIvf-RwsPX0bB8_36KOl5f8w==&ch=qW33XwyaIMVqndU32xZQmfo337UeLIe5aQh-5SFyWqu1o0UYyq_K4Q==)
Now, I'm building on that record of **BIPARTISAN** success by running for Congress. Fighting for Florida has been my **SOLE PRIORITY** for the last nine years. This has never been about scoring political points -- it has been about serving the country that gave my family **EVERYTHING**. **** [HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AzPrNStuuL5LBTUf15Ku3TybBBHS2GPkHUg7lqcTWtafngcVVZwwcFfZ65-IT-M3uFOwOe3I_aZhUdry9G3aFNgSCBgAgIkiVv0FCpNnGUYyDao6AT4jKlpFXVVeEhrJA40nriSvmwJuCGCAM2r1SwmcfYbHGV4wQ7ioRMUq_InotxLAWMlZNhC297ezjMGnQTDgh_gCbIsw2HuF09NM0tbHxCG2OaFshxoP_VxiGy2-FQK0qNLs96KuyL0ZSVv_EpVUNg7WV_oVxcwGuLOO1jVRyBBfX3DCfVQf5jAWe17iyswsUWpZGsZxngr5BuS26cCS-oLVtPZ-pCes0h_Kij975ywHEyibYPGn7bvvZf2vucWstCpxbcXRlHrga6Jz5KnN-ej8ZgSUCUUmVlSc63am_FUDQeWNuYdypRvZCCXasNDerxxjtQ==&c=0W_r3772qsEkiUBY9aQyC11MNS3BpkIIvf-RwsPX0bB8_36KOl5f8w==&ch=qW33XwyaIMVqndU32xZQmfo337UeLIe5aQh-5SFyWqu1o0UYyq_K4Q==)
I've been privileged to serve my community for the last thirty years. To have been able to give **SO MUCH BACK** to the country that I love has been the honor of a lifetime. [HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AzPrNStuuL5LBTUf15Ku3TybBBHS2GPkHUg7lqcTWtafngcVVZwwcFfZ65-IT-M3uFOwOe3I_aZhUdry9G3aFNgSCBgAgIkiVv0FCpNnGUYyDao6AT4jKlpFXVVeEhrJA40nriSvmwJuCGCAM2r1SwmcfYbHGV4wQ7ioRMUq_InotxLAWMlZNhC297ezjMGnQTDgh_gCbIsw2HuF09NM0tbHxCG2OaFshxoP_VxiGy2-FQK0qNLs96KuyL0ZSVv_EpVUNg7WV_oVxcwGuLOO1jVRyBBfX3DCfVQf5jAWe17iyswsUWpZGsZxngr5BuS26cCS-oLVtPZ-pCes0h_Kij975ywHEyibYPGn7bvvZf2vucWstCpxbcXRlHrga6Jz5KnN-ej8ZgSUCUUmVlSc63am_FUDQeWNuYdypRvZCCXasNDerxxjtQ==&c=0W_r3772qsEkiUBY9aQyC11MNS3BpkIIvf-RwsPX0bB8_36KOl5f8w==&ch=qW33XwyaIMVqndU32xZQmfo337UeLIe5aQh-5SFyWqu1o0UYyq_K4Q==) As a child, I escaped Cuba with my family in search of a better life -- and we found that here in South Florida. **I raised a family, children and grandchildren, and worked hard to achieve the American Dream. **

But that dream is fading away for many Americans who don't think they'll see the prosperity and opportunity their parents did -- and that's why I'm running for Congress.
[HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AzPrNStuuL5LBTUf15Ku3TybBBHS2GPkHUg7lqcTWtafngcVVZwwcFfZ65-IT-M3uFOwOe3I_aZhUdry9G3aFNgSCBgAgIkiVv0FCpNnGUYyDao6AT4jKlpFXVVeEhrJA40nriSvmwJuCGCAM2r1SwmcfYbHGV4wQ7ioRMUq_InotxLAWMlZNhC297ezjMGnQTDgh_gCbIsw2HuF09NM0tbHxCG2OaFshxoP_VxiGy2-FQK0qNLs96KuyL0ZSVv_EpVUNg7WV_oVxcwGuLOO1jVRyBBfX3DCfVQf5jAWe17iyswsUWpZGsZxngr5BuS26cCS-oLVtPZ-pCes0h_Kij975ywHEyibYPGn7bvvZf2vucWstCpxbcXRlHrga6Jz5KnN-ej8ZgSUCUUmVlSc63am_FUDQeWNuYdypRvZCCXasNDerxxjtQ==&c=0W_r3772qsEkiUBY9aQyC11MNS3BpkIIvf-RwsPX0bB8_36KOl5f8w==&ch=qW33XwyaIMVqndU32xZQmfo337UeLIe5aQh-5SFyWqu1o0UYyq_K4Q==) I'm going to Washington to **WORK** for _t_ _hose who need it most, those who 've been ignored by career politicians with no interests other than their own._ [******But this fight won 't be easy -- our FAR LEFT OPPONENT has MILLIONS MORE than we do. clean_body: We have a record to be proud of, %%First Name%%, and now it's time to bring this record of results to Congress. == Here are the facts: The general election is in just 10 Days Our liberal opponent is lining up every dollar she can against us It's up to us to take her on. As Mayor of Miami-Dade County, I took on special interests and raging partisanship to fight for those who mattered: hardworking South Floridians who feel their government is failing to work for THEM. And I 'm proud of what we accomplished: I balanced a budget of $8.9 billion 8 YEARS in a ROW. Cut taxes by $1,700 PER HOUSEHOLD. Fought for transparency and accountability. Saved the taxpayers $400,000,000.00+ in wasteful spending. Dropped unemployment from 10% to BELOW 2%. Led one of the STRONGEST economic comebacks in American history. And the results are clear: Miami-Dade County is more prosperous, ready to take on the challenges of the 21st Century, and ready to lead the nation in opportunity and growth. == Now, I'm building on that record of BIPARTISAN success by running for Congress. Fighting for Florida has been my SOLE PRIORITY for the last nine years. This has never been about scoring political points -- it has been about serving the country that gave my family EVERYTHING. == I've been privileged to serve my community for the last thirty years. To have been able to give SO MUCH BACK to the country that I love has been the honor of a lifetime. == As a child, I escaped Cuba with my family in search of a better life -- and we found that here in South Florida. I raised a family, children and grandchildren, and worked hard to achieve the American Dream. But that dream is fading away for many Americans who don't think they'll see the prosperity and opportunity their parents did -- and that's why I'm running for Congress. == I'm going to Washington to WORK** for t hose who need it most, those who 've been ignored by career politicians with no interests other than their own. == Thanks for all of your help, Mayor Carlos Gimenez Paid for by Carlos Gimenez for Congress 1421 SW 107TH AVE #236 Miami, FL 33174 == | | Carlos Gimenez for Congress | 1421 SW 107TH AVE #236, Miami, FL 33174 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dtvdgzthq5bkYFZJAldsBMV24zzeuUp832kE3Hjqzc6TgDrMhnz-4Lc3xGf60SRNUmWaSbyu0D0CLU--z9ZUTiWQHdR2aPdXTIhRUwVioC2cZYkRlanC_jsEJe2kFeydcJYCsRQTGHNFx5A2QflD2tYhtgQkLmXk5x-YQpxCGiEHYA678nW2jtSQXFn3V1B6_8Vj7I36vahYHXOUfG81MXIgnH0EB-y95EPFyTeKotRN1-AIgawKY61Vxw54wyA55Tat4BVkmvOPnv0pldC3eGlFVnu87fgsFUE-vQN3ulpgzSxebEpmDRY-EZ8oj959v4UkMTChiWss1joaNh8Tn5EgcsDoUn7mMpAZNUOes4QkeofJ2dUoh_Y1XshRTDoPffF6sU-uwqUni_NLXakaatX8GMVDtoxsXEQ4oUh_ksgDzCmHIVefPswsuURdxjKCKpMeetSWENxK2exaEH9BQ==&c=1rSUmwdy0ymGf6PdEoHFxBDYgP9bwGofwrU7ARiavwn1GKWlQz8jbg==&ch=Yaa37SdfcEyDkUiyxCS1sijhBN1gsG-W8HWcaSO1DAGZhWlqWxKAaA==)

Dear Friend,

I'll come right to the point.
I came to Washington as part of the 2010 wave and then won re-election in the historic 2016 election that elevated Donald Trump to the White House... so I've seen a lot.
But the Left's ongoing abuse of power beats all and, left unchecked, will destroy everything you and I stand for.
[**That 's why today, I'm urgently asking for your help to defend the future of our great country.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dtvdgzthq5bkYFZJAldsBMV24zzeuUp832kE3Hjqzc6TgDrMhnz-4Lc3xGf60SRNUmWaSbyu0D0CLU--z9ZUTiWQHdR2aPdXTIhRUwVioC2cZYkRlanC_jsEJe2kFeydcJYCsRQTGHNFx5A2QflD2tYhtgQkLmXk5x-YQpxCGiEHYA678nW2jtSQXFn3V1B6_8Vj7I36vahYHXOUfG81MXIgnH0EB-y95EPFyTeKotRN1-AIgawKY61Vxw54wyA55Tat4BVkmvOPnv0pldC3eGlFVnu87fgsFUE-vQN3ulpgzSxebEpmDRY-EZ8oj959v4UkMTChiWss1joaNh8Tn5EgcsDoUn7mMpAZNUOes4QkeofJ2dUoh_Y1XshRTDoPffF6sU-uwqUni_NLXakaatX8GMVDtoxsXEQ4oUh_ksgDzCmHIVefPswsuURdxjKCKpMeetSWENxK2exaEH9BQ==&c=1rSUmwdy0ymGf6PdEoHFxBDYgP9bwGofwrU7ARiavwn1GKWlQz8jbg==&ch=Yaa37SdfcEyDkUiyxCS1sijhBN1gsG-W8HWcaSO1DAGZhWlqWxKAaA==)
**FACT:** first, liberals in the Obama administration weaponized the IRS to target conservatives;
**FACT:** these same liberals then weaponized the courts and the heavily-entrenched federal bureaucracy to block the Trump administration at every turn;
**FACT:** next, these liberals weaponized the U.S. Constitution, specifically the impeachment process, in a flimsy attempt to reverse the outcome of the 2016 election; and
**FACT:** they're not done... they're just getting started...
The Democrats, the radical Left, and their allies in the federal bureaucracy and mainstream media will stop at nothing to tighten their grip on power --- even threatening to pack the Supreme Court, kill the filibuster, and end the Electoral College.
They've got the U.S. House... and they desperately want the U.S. Senate.
To realize this objective, they've set their sights on defeating conservatives in swing-states --- **which makes me their #1 target.**
An anti-Trump group is dropping nearly $500,000 in ads against me already!
That's why I ordered my campaign to immediately launch this **Charter Member** program to lay the foundation for what will most certainly be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
What does it mean to be a Charter Member?
Well, for starters, it means that you are the first to answer the call - to stand by my side when it matters the most.
It also means that you are willing to serve as a critical sounding-board for me and for my campaign --- which is why I hope you'll allow me to stay in regular communication and ask you to share your opinion and insights from time to time.
Lastly, it means that you don't just _talk-the-talk_ , but that you are a conservative willing to _walk-the-walk_ by [**rushing an emergency, one-time contribution of $35 to my campaign headquarters in the next 48 hours.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dtvdgzthq5bkYFZJAldsBMV24zzeuUp832kE3Hjqzc6TgDrMhnz-4Lc3xGf60SRNUmWaSbyu0D0CLU--z9ZUTiWQHdR2aPdXTIhRUwVioC2cZYkRlanC_jsEJe2kFeydcJYCsRQTGHNFx5A2QflD2tYhtgQkLmXk5x-YQpxCGiEHYA678nW2jtSQXFn3V1B6_8Vj7I36vahYHXOUfG81MXIgnH0EB-y95EPFyTeKotRN1-AIgawKY61Vxw54wyA55Tat4BVkmvOPnv0pldC3eGlFVnu87fgsFUE-vQN3ulpgzSxebEpmDRY-EZ8oj959v4UkMTChiWss1joaNh8Tn5EgcsDoUn7mMpAZNUOes4QkeofJ2dUoh_Y1XshRTDoPffF6sU-uwqUni_NLXakaatX8GMVDtoxsXEQ4oUh_ksgDzCmHIVefPswsuURdxjKCKpMeetSWENxK2exaEH9BQ==&c=1rSUmwdy0ymGf6PdEoHFxBDYgP9bwGofwrU7ARiavwn1GKWlQz8jbg==&ch=Yaa37SdfcEyDkUiyxCS1sijhBN1gsG-W8HWcaSO1DAGZhWlqWxKAaA==)
_The 2018 Florida Senate race cost over $200 million._
Democrats and their dark-money allies poured everything they had into that race, but Republicans held on to win by a razor-thin margin (10,033 out of over 8 million votes cast).
This is the kind of 10-round, knock-down, drag-out fight you and I must fight.
I don't say "prepare to fight" or "expect to fight"...
... I say "fight" because we're knee-deep in it already.
You see, Florida is such a pivotal state on the electoral map (both this year and two years from now, when I'm on the ballot), that the Democrats are in permanent campaign mode here.
They are already attacking me and fine-tuning their campaign machine.
And recent history proves that the radical Left will stop at nothing to take power --- their ambition knows no bounds.
Their ultimate goal is to enshrine an agenda that is beyond extreme. This is what it means to be a Democrat:
***** Embracing socialism**
*****Advocating for infanticide**
*****Smashing the rule-of-law via wide-open borders and sanctuary cities**
*****Tearing down institutions like the Supreme Court (adding seats to "pack" it with liberals); the Electoral College (replacing it with a national popular vote), and the 1st Amendment (cracking down on conservative speech on social media, on campus, and in businesses owned by persons of faith)**
Enough. This agenda is beyond dangerous.
And, this agenda is exactly what we'll get, if Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies take control of the U.S. Senate.
Make no mistake, this threatens to fundamentally alter our nation and reverse all that we as conservatives stand for and have fought too hard to achieve.
So much is at stake.
And it's no exaggeration to say the outcome of the Democrats' power-grab will be determined by what happens right here in Florida this year... and two years from now... and two years from then... and so on.
[**That 's why I hope you'll accept my offer to become a Charter Member and send a generous contribution of $35 to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate today.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dtvdgzthq5bkYFZJAldsBMV24zzeuUp832kE3Hjqzc6TgDrMhnz-4Lc3xGf60SRNUmWaSbyu0D0CLU--z9ZUTiWQHdR2aPdXTIhRUwVioC2cZYkRlanC_jsEJe2kFeydcJYCsRQTGHNFx5A2QflD2tYhtgQkLmXk5x-YQpxCGiEHYA678nW2jtSQXFn3V1B6_8Vj7I36vahYHXOUfG81MXIgnH0EB-y95EPFyTeKotRN1-AIgawKY61Vxw54wyA55Tat4BVkmvOPnv0pldC3eGlFVnu87fgsFUE-vQN3ulpgzSxebEpmDRY-EZ8oj959v4UkMTChiWss1joaNh8Tn5EgcsDoUn7mMpAZNUOes4QkeofJ2dUoh_Y1XshRTDoPffF6sU-uwqUni_NLXakaatX8GMVDtoxsXEQ4oUh_ksgDzCmHIVefPswsuURdxjKCKpMeetSWENxK2exaEH9BQ==&c=1rSUmwdy0ymGf6PdEoHFxBDYgP9bwGofwrU7ARiavwn1GKWlQz8jbg==&ch=Yaa37SdfcEyDkUiyxCS1sijhBN1gsG-W8HWcaSO1DAGZhWlqWxKAaA==)
I value your input and I genuinely need to hear from you today. With you on my team, I'm confident we can engage and triumph in this long battle to stop the Democrats from taking back this Senate seat.
Don't forget... as I write this, they're at it already. So if you can send more than $35 --- [**say $50, $75, $125, $500, $1,000 or even the FEC "max" of $2,800 - it would come as a tremendous blessing.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dtvdgzthq5bkYFZJAldsBMV24zzeuUp832kE3Hjqzc6TgDrMhnz-4Lc3xGf60SRNUmWaSbyu0D0CLU--z9ZUTiWQHdR2aPdXTIhRUwVioC2cZYkRlanC_jsEJe2kFeydcJYCsRQTGHNFx5A2QflD2tYhtgQkLmXk5x-YQpxCGiEHYA678nW2jtSQXFn3V1B6_8Vj7I36vahYHXOUfG81MXIgnH0EB-y95EPFyTeKotRN1-AIgawKY61Vxw54wyA55Tat4BVkmvOPnv0pldC3eGlFVnu87fgsFUE-vQN3ulpgzSxebEpmDRY-EZ8oj959v4UkMTChiWss1joaNh8Tn5EgcsDoUn7mMpAZNUOes4QkeofJ2dUoh_Y1XshRTDoPffF6sU-uwqUni_NLXakaatX8GMVDtoxsXEQ4oUh_ksgDzCmHIVefPswsuURdxjKCKpMeetSWENxK2exaEH9BQ==&c=1rSUmwdy0ymGf6PdEoHFxBDYgP9bwGofwrU7ARiavwn1GKWlQz8jbg==&ch=Yaa37SdfcEyDkUiyxCS1sijhBN1gsG-W8HWcaSO1DAGZhWlqWxKAaA==)
The most important thing is that you respond today.
I also want you to know how much I appreciate you taking the time to read my letter today and, even more so, I want to express my deep gratitude to you for being the first to answer the call to stand with me now, when I need you the most.
You can count on me to continue leading the fight for our conservative, Republican principles in the U.S. Senate.
In fact, having you as a Charter Member of my re-election campaign means I can continue focusing 110% on the fight at hand --- especially when it comes to exposing and stamping out the Democrats' on-going abuse of power.
Again, thank you. Lets win this.
Sincerely,
Sen. Marco Rubio
[**[BECOME A CHARTER MEMBER NOW >>]**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dtvdgzthq5bkYFZJAldsBMV24zzeuUp832kE3Hjqzc6TgDrMhnz-4Lc3xGf60SRNUmWaSbyu0D0CLU--z9ZUTiWQHdR2aPdXTIhRUwVioC2cZYkRlanC_jsEJe2kFeydcJYCsRQTGHNFx5A2QflD2tYhtgQkLmXk5x-YQpxCGiEHYA678nW2jtSQXFn3V1B6_8Vj7I36vahYHXOUfG81MXIgnH0EB-y95EPFyTeKotRN1-AIgawKY61Vxw54wyA55Tat4BVkmvOPnv0pldC3eGlFVnu87fgsFUE-vQN3ulpgzSxebEpmDRY-EZ8oj959v4UkMTChiWss1joaNh8Tn5EgcsDoUn7mMpAZNUOes4QkeofJ2dUoh_Y1XshRTDoPffF6sU-uwqUni_NLXakaatX8GMVDtoxsXEQ4oUh_ksgDzCmHIVefPswsuURdxjKCKpMeetSWENxK2exaEH9BQ==&c=1rSUmwdy0ymGf6PdEoHFxBDYgP9bwGofwrU7ARiavwn1GKWlQz8jbg==&ch=Yaa37SdfcEyDkUiyxCS1sijhBN1gsG-W8HWcaSO1DAGZhWlqWxKAaA==)
P.S. Ronald Reagan often spoke of a "time for choosing". My friend, this is it. The lines have been drawn. In consider us blessed --- you and me --- to be given this opportunity to fight for the country we so love. [**Please, let me know if I can count on you to join this important fight by rushing a gift of $35 right now.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014dtvdgzthq5bkYFZJAldsBMV24zzeuUp832kE3Hjqzc6TgDrMhnz-4Lc3xGf60SRNUmWaSbyu0D0CLU--z9ZUTiWQHdR2aPdXTIhRUwVioC2cZYkRlanC_jsEJe2kFeydcJYCsRQTGHNFx5A2QflD2tYhtgQkLmXk5x-YQpxCGiEHYA678nW2jtSQXFn3V1B6_8Vj7I36vahYHXOUfG81MXIgnH0EB-y95EPFyTeKotRN1-AIgawKY61Vxw54wyA55Tat4BVkmvOPnv0pldC3eGlFVnu87fgsFUE-vQN3ulpgzSxebEpmDRY-EZ8oj959v4UkMTChiWss1joaNh8Tn5EgcsDoUn7mMpAZNUOes4QkeofJ2dUoh_Y1XshRTDoPffF6sU-uwqUni_NLXakaatX8GMVDtoxsXEQ4oUh_ksgDzCmHIVefPswsuURdxjKCKpMeetSWENxK2exaEH9BQ==&c=1rSUmwdy0ymGf6PdEoHFxBDYgP9bwGofwrU7ARiavwn1GKWlQz8jbg==&ch=Yaa37SdfcEyDkUiyxCS1sijhBN1gsG-W8HWcaSO1DAGZhWlqWxKAaA==)

This agenda is beyond dangerous. And, this agenda is exactly what we'll get, if Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies take control of the U.S. Senate. Make no mistake, this threatens to fundamentally alter our nation and reverse all that we as conservatives stand for and have fought too hard to achieve. So much is at stake. And it's no exaggeration to say the outcome of the Democrats' power-grab will be determined by what happens right here in Florida this year... and two years from now... and two years from then... and so on. == I value your input and I genuinely need to hear from you today. With you on my team, I'm confident we can engage and triumph in this long battle to stop the Democrats from taking back this Senate seat. Don't forget... as I write this, they're at it already. So if you can send more than $35 --- == The most important thing is that you respond today. I also want you to know how much I appreciate you taking the time to read my letter today and, even more so, I want to express my deep gratitude to you for being the first to answer the call to stand with me now, when I need you the most. You can count on me to continue leading the fight for our conservative, Republican principles in the U.S. Senate. In fact, having you as a Charter Member of my re-election campaign means I can continue focusing 110% on the fight at hand --- especially when it comes to exposing and stamping out the Democrats' on-going abuse of power. Again, thank you. Lets win this. Sincerely, Sen. Marco Rubio [[BECOME A CHARTER MEMBER NOW >>]](==) P.S. Ronald Reagan often spoke of a "time for choosing". My friend, this is it. The lines have been drawn. In consider us blessed --- you and me --- to be given this opportunity to fight for the country we so love. == Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 == | | Marco Rubio for Senate | 228 S WASHINGTON ST STE 115, ALEXANDRIA, VA 22314 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Make your voice heard before the vote
body:
Peter,
On Monday, the Senate is expected to vote on the nomination of Amy Coney Barrett to the United States Supreme Court.
The political tension is heightened with the elections less than two weeks away. It is critical that you urge your senators to vote to confirm Amy Coney Barrett to the Court.
While it is estimated that the votes are secured to confirm her, the opposition to Judge Barrett’s nomination by radical activists will be felt far and wide on Capitol Hill on Monday.\
People of faith must have their voices heard on this historic day. We cannot leave anything up to chance. [**Voice your support for Judge Barrett by using our tool to send this email to your senators.**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=K7OK5pFGmYW9jqf9nL6D5X28Mxc1j8O13UM3enc1Eds&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201024com01&n=1)
Once you take action, please continue to join us in our national effort to help get Christians to the polls. Christians must be reminded that the Supreme Court is on the ballot this election.
One party plans to honor the 150 year Court precedent of a nine-justice Court, and the other plans to pack the Court by adding more justices to gain a majority to advance their political ideology.
Besides the most essential tool of prayer and faithful action of believers, the best governmental protection for our Constitutional Republic is nine justices on the bench who interpret the law passed by our elected leaders, rather than legislating from the bench.
If you have not sent a message yet to your senators, please do it right now.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=K7OK5pFGmYW9jqf9nL6D5X28Mxc1j8O13UM3enc1Eds&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201024com01&n=2)
**Pary. Think. Vote.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201024com01&n=3)
**P.S.** Do you have your voter guide yet? We’ve got you covered! [Get your Virginia voter guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201024com01&n=4) covering every candidate and referendum on your ballot. Share these with every Christian you can!
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201024com01&n=5).

Peter,

Republicans have few offensive opportunities this year – and quite frankly, one of the best shots our Party has to flip a House seat this cycle is the seat I’m running for in Oregon.

ICYMI – _Politico_ released an article last week which really captures the mood here on the ground in Oregon: **_“senior Democrats have grown nervous and officials acknowledge the race will be closer than they’d like.”_**

My opponent recognized that I am the guy who has the best shot at sending him into retirement, so he dialed up Nancy Pelosi and asked her to send in some air support. Of course, she acquiesced, and now **our best estimates put Democrats’ total spending in this race at more than $2.6 million.** DeFazio is one of their MVPs and they’re going to do everything they can to defeat me in TEN short days.

**[I’m going to lose this race if we can’t match their spending dollar-for-dollar. Please, I too need some air support. It’s now or never.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6072687d02674d61b4bc717fb0f3fa8b&_e=Bz7THzJRcVb5bKLW7v_CB9INkVlUAYbWvMN_VK4JugHPKYIpiucyYXWwsOBdaTycfDGqnBb8CixGZXyk2HWK-XfnwiUy3l4AlJqj6elAJg6N5jNRjjndY7WEOEiirq3-zSJeRBAc68YObRwb-1XKBEpBfJ48pGTK2E-fmvErmxTl47yFDBdqEWUW9wKqN-qk_M9MwlS80bjKKPrqJSpdzpHW8vIILBhPq11YPBjXuJb-F2Eq-7k3nu9y2CoSSS4W1eN0mVcUlEjuVU-umy5u9Kukh6JLFCBmC0id10d-9tBpw5sCdb5R3oIgQECgNJcA)**

| [**Donate To My Victory Fund** **› › **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6072687d02674d61b4bc717fb0f3fa8b&_e=Bz7THzJRcVb5bKLW7v_CB9INkVlUAYbWvMN_VK4JugHPKYIpiucyYXWwsOBdaTycfDGqnBb8CixGZXyk2HWK-XfnwiUy3l4AlJqj6elAJg69vHijiFL1kE4cW4JXdht6ABXxjgszONc2Tsz2X8CzRvpxRV5AHcIkxxmRIE0Mt84MjRz2WV2r6bls75qjAYGudu-n6NGOIOHuBGf1HR50wgpNHP4dK72jcMcCTsV6J-kCvRzAkEFmriMBIL_jy9hRmZK81eonAAFr3dCe1a-yQ-DyshB3uRebRKMBW6ZGqkehr6H9Fahdbz_3SF7EeO2f)
---

From the very beginning, this campaign has been built on the generosity of small-dollar donors, and that is how I plan to finish it. **Your support** has enabled us to nationalize this race and force Nancy Pelosi and national Democrats to spend big bucks in defense of my opponent.

We have Democrats on the run – but **my fundraising numbers seems to be stalling out at the worst possible time** ; I just checked and we’re a full $55,000 behind where we were at this point in September.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please consider making a gift of any amount to my campaign right now to help us get back on track?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6072687d02674d61b4bc717fb0f3fa8b&_e=Bz7THzJRcVb5bKLW7v_CB9INkVlUAYbWvMN_VK4JugHPKYIpiucyYXWwsOBdaTycfDGqnBb8CixGZXyk2HWK-XfnwiUy3l4AlJqj6elAJg64c83Se4u2H3d5aVnTLopQ4CzBL_tlCNgap9wdHaQ8b676SgkhbUa3Al3VkNuZdzhgiApQ_U0DYY2aHssR-foA6dncUTitV_Rq9OlCeD70E6ztdkJ9Q19fBCXapjBwrQh0cjH5KkfKzO9naxLeYj3zFeYFTvxw6cYZ3u_PUVcFc6jPXywbLFrVtGItyjM2BFXjI83Ly8lixMBU16ukS0oE)**

[**Chip-in before Midnight** **› › **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6072687d02674d61b4bc717fb0f3fa8b&_e=Bz7THzJRcVb5bKLW7v_CB9INkVlUAYbWvMN_VK4JugHPKYIpiucyYXWwsOBdaTycfDGqnBb8CixGZXyk2HWK-XfnwiUy3l4AlJqj6elAJg4X36Y89Xl6ZEvEUBUUHzJzd7KT_pbaIzM5QwStiC9UHiX9sFD9W3VSqLVMl_3amDbZHxbYZgT_adVGmS-CVlts9jQNkyA9G20Zc9MythRr8dUOybm0uGcRg2c3uqd2pWQJ_-DwagFCabrLWInIqC4q_-Wr4tqA_K_ZzPmiSl3c6SefSMewyj1ofkMoRNj4ECUyBO1ZY_Z2VFgIUoBXfch_)

name: Senate Alerts via Team Todd
subject: Ten days, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
Time is running out.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J63wVm13NJnlczwc0PKmHp2IKVgu5IqBplIscaS-uLdPLpMe6M8Jl708cpSx2e3qxGqRujo3C01C5UjhDr6BJD-Tu610JxOCSvNpnem4tl96G1If4txnn5jF-vvUWU9c0E_rTiNpQTB8BWWRPGwMv98Zr1eiA_RBheDPxBqDFOl9PSBzj6bq2iRnKGtiCnKtDbZ6VYMbJCbxB-S05ONW32Fg8UQ8kpbLwdvLJYrBQehNVJI1ixwmOwZLibMgPzANyD90jMlHEyfJHoEv3MGt-nDMQby1N4iDyCzo6qDaF1x8SLhizQcGkamLfT7URPSK_nb1MleiZo_-b7nEW2exJrGxVxFdtCLYzzSswP1aeelg3BmUWjOKCpsdfF6cYLJsrx-QixDgD9h3ycJDjpzl_jDKUqGnOihxYctK6raOhKX8kzt4S_aSiCBx-Jta3fwQd5Pvf5VBnSxCFJDeQGzVbA==&c=8ZnOoIL8JqBa8l3YSNWif4-YnesM24WOrg8FRT7EkyQWTXv5NThVuA==&ch=qgGXcrfwg-NzdO-xBKBbv00A53sIb2rFDgRE4BsRs3Zenf0AfkeTMw==)

Friend -- time is running out.

We are less than two weeks away from the most important election of our lifetimes, and we desperately need your help. Todd Young, Chairman of the NRSC is responsible for providing the funds necessary to defend the Senate Majority, but those funds are running out.

Democrats are raising record numbers all across the country and we are struggling to keep up. In Iowa, Colorado, North Carolina, and Arizona, we are struggling to break through the barrage of attack ads from Democrat dark money groups.

Todd, and all Senate Republicans, are counting on our incredible grassroots to step up right now before it's too late. body:

| Through 24 years of service to our country as a Lieutenant Colonel in the U.S. Army, decades of service to her patients as a doctor, and service to the state of Iowa as the director of the Department of Public Health, Mariannette has the experience and tenacity to serve our country once again as a U.S. Congresswoman.

We need your help to win this election. Because this race is one of the most competitive in the country. [$25, $50 or even $10 could go a long way towards flipping this seat red](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=4601c85514&e=16fac31a0f). Your help could be the final push we need to secure this victory, and believe me, you don't want to spend November 4th wishing you could have done more.

Thank you for your support!

Curt Meeks

body:

We MUST stop Pelosi from buying this seat out from under us. [**Can you chip in right now to do just that and defeat her handpicked candidate? Without your support, we don 't stand a chance.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00133GN19yQq5ypJh8ulfXkbEHE5J5Zd3_Pl7Ei9VGiMgob7mZIyQ3c1wj1EQ9qdo0Fo7sXT9W6ObmD4GzBHLkycbnNKF3Tty7wNFZdrnzo0HyzgsZWbedbUcG5o1NTTBseQ0C9hBGfQmGLV54iw0CMf8h-JJIR0uD1VYS_Jx5RdCE3Xg1zY3dlye7jZimBGTxSpW4oLs7cQGGoI0aEFHuXsDPUK1_2HphiBTsfVzih0TkGtsFc_oANeQ-t6A_hA3CRN9CWCGA5Ge3mdKCiPiZfwCFA5z32_dG1wbNfz5fbzS_sfeHZeC4pufpDFHHoCrrP2l4VQ4mScViQ0pSkutc5yfiZXYZDULuUZSn4mtKWjiuIlTZdocbioOLnKVqnwjcqoMED_T9hZXd2xi0Pmp-TniXbxYrivRbhKRF7eIynbAE=&c=ig-SxS2lVlQ6AjM3msYpQQhyEkNPicE3MAETaCedV9Uz2SdsQFgWHQ==&ch=gCA1YOowlLMo06oAIgmrP13c785dG97J8VAdThXTazvoRXtc6AwnLQ==)

We're facing an uphill battle in one of the most-watched and most important races this year. Just 10 days out, we're running out of time to reach the small handful of on-the-fence voters who will decide the election.

body:
Enough is enough.
Friend,

We're just 11 days away from the most important election of our lifetime and the Radical Left is still outraising us by a wide margin. There are just 11 days until Election Day. And the truth is,**the future of the United States Senate will come down to my race in Maine.** Chuck Schumer has admitted Maine is the key to flipping the Senate from red to blue. From day 1, he has done everything in his power to control Maine's fate.
MILLIONS of dollars from Chuck Schumer and countless Far Left groups continue to pour into Maine. Our country is at a pivotal moment in our history, and we simply cannot afford to let Chuck Schumer and his radical policies take control. subject: My team could really use a cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
It's Saturday morning, and my team is still hard at work. They haven't taken a day off in months, and frankly, I've never seen anything like it. They are working so hard every single day to reach Colorado voters and get our message of common-sense conservatism out to the masses.

Friend -- it's Saturday morning, and my team is still hard at work.

They haven't taken a day off in months, and frankly, I've never seen anything like it. They are working so hard every single day to reach Colorado voters and get our message of common-sense conservatism out to the masses.

That's why I am asking for your help today in buying them all a cup of coffee tomorrow morning as we continue this fight. [**Will you chip in $5 today to help me buy coffee for my team tomorrow? **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QN_mPDkpmjGdwEVQdOQvsxMY3qahKTL8omL8Hh5CVU5vNWMxzlxy5y27wFZLaRbNsGPwFTMJ8nEbNStZM6T3h_eC4z1EmWO-mR0xDm1lWQwmh6L3JbzRDzLyiAf6MzZqeYJSwqvhiqX91JYIHEnllYUe0S6eX0IgBcqmrYrfBHII35tSLCA8xG85zufnC6rue93MxnlmKVq6T4Wx9TA60BFtToNA_S6eYOofPSU0mqqAV8r8tVsoGX_HeZgY0BO-vj7xIrFqwoTbhFO5OarHKQoSmQQW2_q7YhHVBcpu0Y9vH0xJVZZvVoUuziVuSjwtQWFv5znD511kB7pJ0DvPFxhXav4eIqQsk7gt6ngYb4CENoyxtK13uT8lSSDPwx4BMLSLvLh-0U4Y3umxBSO1GIx5-hB6gh5TdsRr_nMAWUjSlAW3zld8doxtnfYNozwlihQeISxrCXk8jIFmbSYhZg6zKbF3f6tM&c=KxYjy6viyPOCA6jWauTsZ2n-cKY8qGThTE_aVJbBdjw1QySPpxWKyg==&ch=VG-qdIW54PTBp4rj27LgFfTMqLzTkKUe9Q6j4UgPNfRQmzYo2oLf4A==)

body:
Did you see?
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010nwSifMjs6sL8zfUGZXHVaRB2prbktGtVsU0tg6vl40PAi82bREyQ0fPOn0TpKrQkvdroc6FQzzbfxwlj7Hm_4076NlcohaEHtrua_ebXWfOha1INkTDX69IVtKGa7F1woF_Rm6eHbsEznNyy-ykysfm3-Lg6yt8yQMbdZ0tIdyqLPWeyNEj-9O4P1bRlkuMvTU2DflFsVzuq4BbaUq-hqfS9ObO6TUoot1ZTfzihWAVhS0dc-Mb3HsUHiIzZwZfVgtDNtgljiY-V9DutWVOeuVc6F5MHZ2iuJj3bY2god7MxCAOmbCxCEYti2dg6qq-CCQM21Qg484BoaJ5rp6Knp70Fko01OFr5X2fXZ2inaSZb0R6eqmgB96Tg_t5f4q4F_vTpcjEN9WLQ1VkiBOUag==&c=LKKbZwNa5WIvC-_gf-MYrTMY8ukuCB1IFKJ8WYFUys-Y_FizHCDXIA==&ch=C5S5tmHDT99ijV6PNUXJUXJe-NgZKKOd0GVmJRohACZcVymXjWFK2g==)

Friend, did you see?

Counterfeit Kelly has dodged questions AGAIN about his support for the Radical Left's job-killing agenda, his financial connections to the Chinese Communist regime AND his history of profiting off pyramid schemes.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: A message from Governor Holcomb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
You don’t have to wait until November 3rd to make your voice heard. Early voting is open and thousands of Hoosiers have already hit the polls. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

We’re putting on a full court press from now until November 3rd to make sure every Hoosier gets out and votes for Governor Holcomb.

**It’s never been more important to make your voice heard, and you don’t even have to wait until November 3rd to cast a ballot!**

Friend,

Who is Georgette's opponent, Sara Jacobs, _really_?

She's a **millionaire heiress** , currently spending millions of her family's tech fortune to **buy her way into Congress -- for the second time!** She couldn't buy her way past Congressmen Mike Levin in CA-49 in 2018, so she's trying again in CA-53.

Her FEC report shows that over 86% of the more than $5 million her campaign has spent has come from her trust fund. Her wealthy family is pumping _huge_ amounts of money into her campaign -- **an advantage that our grassroots, people-funded campaign doesn't have.**

[**We have less than two weeks until Election Day, and we have to fundraise as much as possible so Georgette can keep up against her opponent's billionaire family fund. Will you chip in $5 or more today to help get us there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20727231/258121677/-605652049?refcode=em20_201024_jacobs1_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGU4MGYyYi0zMzE2LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTKhPynkA4xE5ottHcDiGBtVe58sArt8-6nYmlAMorU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20727232/258121678/-605652049?refcode=em20_201024_jacobs1_in&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGU4MGYyYi0zMzE2LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTKhPynkA4xE5ottHcDiGBtVe58sArt8-6nYmlAMorU=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20727233/258121679/-605652049?refcode=em20_201024_jacobs1_in&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGU4MGYyYi0zMzE2LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTKhPynkA4xE5ottHcDiGBtVe58sArt8-6nYmlAMorU=)

Here's another fact about our opponent: **Sara Jacobs supports Trump's tax cuts for corporations** (the same corporations she's invested in!) _that have made billions in the pandemic while ripping off families and laying off workers._

In contrast, Georgette knows we must repeal Trump's disastrous handouts to the wealthy which have benefitted _no one but the super rich._

And in Congress, she will work against big money interests that try to influence politics for their own agenda. **Instead, she'll advocate for the rest of us -- working families who are struggling to pay their bills, who need affordable housing and health care _right now._**

That's because **Georgette Gómez stands for us, the working people of San Diego -- not the billionaire class.** And that fighter is who we need in Congress.

[**If you want to see Georgette win this year and prove to everyone that you don't need a massive trust fund or corporate backers to win an election, contribute $5 or what you can to support our campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20727238/258121684/-605652049?refcode=em20_201024_jacobs1_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGU4MGYyYi0zMzE2LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTKhPynkA4xE5ottHcDiGBtVe58sArt8-6nYmlAMorU=)

\-- Georgette Gómez for Congress

Friend,

**I debated Joe Biden for the FINAL TIME.**

This debate will go down in HISTORY. I showed the American People what's at stake this Election Day: _America's future will either be bright and continue on the path to greatness, or it will spiral down into socialism and decline at the hands of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris._

subject: HELP NEEDED TODAY and THIS WEEK
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends- With the final debate behind us (Go Joe!) and 10 days to go until Election Day, we maintain a laser-focus on voter outreach. We’ve always said this would be a turn out election. This is where we are in the final 10 days of this election. We need your help out hustling the other side and in particular we have two new specific opportunities where we are asking you to direct people now: In-Person Canvassing Help Needed Immediately in PA- We are knocking doors across the state of Pennsylvania! Canvassing will look different this year. Across the campaign, they have enacted measures to prioritize the health and safety of all of our volunteers, staff, and voters. Canvassing is done in a socially distanced manner and with PPE. There will not be large trainings or time spent in offices, however the work you do at the doors, reaching voters, remains important:
* Canvassers must be able to make their own travel and accommodation plans if they’re from out of state. These are fully volunteer roles. This includes bringing their own PPE.
* Canvassers must comply with campaign COVID guidelines.
* Canvassers will use MiniVAN while canvassing. Bring a charger.
* All volunteers must attend a virtual training before signing up for a canvass shift. This is required in order to volunteer in-person.

**Trainings: Daily, 7pm ET** Sign up [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=69b3fc6e5e&e=d6c5c7d7ec). | 85% of the doors knocked in PA right now are people we have not reached on the phone.
---

**Can’t Go To PA? Help Us Recruit People Today at 3PM ET**
We consider you to be Friends and Family. In partnership with BFP, the late help team at the DNC is hosting a “All Staff, Friends & Family” phone bank to recruit volunteers for Pennsylvania and other battleground states at 3:00pm ET Today. JOIN US!

[](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9164398d44&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

In addition, please continue to help push people to: [phone banking](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0b1cc3d97d&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [text banking](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=52994e22dd&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [late help](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a505d0b988&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and [poll observers](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4c34adfb2c&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Turnout will be the key to winning this election. More than [56 million voters](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=de17ae8f7f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) have already cast their ballots. With your support this number can dramatically increase. The final Presidential debate left a lasting impression of what’s at stake in this election.

There is so much on the line in this election. It is imperative that Democrats are talking directly to voters everyday. We still have turn out gaps that must be filled quickly. As President Obama said this week in Philadelphia, “We can’t just imagine a better future. We’ve got to fight for it. We’ve got to out hustle the other side, We've got to out work the other side, We’ve got to vote, like never before and leave no doubt.”

The campaign has done a great job at connecting with voters. Yesterday, Senator Kamala Harris participated in an early vote launch mobilization event in Atlanta, where she delivered remarks at Morehead College and urged voters to cast their ballots early ahead of Mandatory Saturday voting in Georgia.

They are working tirelessly to reach voters and we will too. There is still more to do in the final 10 days of the campaign!

Yous In the Fight,
Muthoni

**In this Update:**
* Download the Greenfly App
* Make a Plan to Vote
* Late Help
* Voter Protection Hotline Volunteers
* DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection
* General Volunteer Sign-up
* Download the Vote Joe App
* Text Banking Opportunities
* Phone Banking Opportunities
* Phone Bank Link Tree (By Coalition)
* Visit IWillVote.com / VoyAVotar.com

**DOWNLOAD GREENFLY APP**
Download the Greenfly app for reliable content to share on social media. When you download the Greenfly app use the code DEMSTEAM to join. Please share these videos on social media and with your networks. We’d like to help as many people as possible find credible information on how to vote, and your voices and networks are so powerful! The easiest way to share these videos is by joining Greenfly.

**MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE**
Voters can learn how to make an effective plan to vote by visiting [makeaplan.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=de289d5af5&e=d6c5c7d7ec). With so much at stake in this election, it is crucial the voters have the latest information on voting so they can make a plan that is best for them.

**LATE HELP**
The Biden Campaign Late Help team is recruiting volunteers who can commit for the last 4 to 10 days of the election. Volunteers will be matched with states in both in-person and virtual activities.[ Late Help Sign Up Form](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3496aefd2f&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**VOTER PROTECTION HOTLINE & VOLUNTEERS**
The National Voter Protection Hotline has a critical need for multilingual-speaking volunteers. Our phones are ringing off the hook with voters who have questions about the process. They need your help to make a plan to vote for Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ticket.With your help, we can ensure that all eligible voters are able to exercise their right to vote. Can you answer the call? Sign up for a training [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3b2acd0c57&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and for a shift [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dca346a0ed&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

Languages needed include: Apache; Arabic ; Cantonese; Creole; Filipino/Tagalog; French; Hindi; Hmong; Korean; Mandarin; Navajo; Punjabi; Somali; Spanish; Vietnamese

**DNC DISABILITY COUNCIL AND VOTER PROTECTION**
The DNC Disability Council and Voter Protection program are partnering to expand the accessibility focus of our Election Protection Plans. They are actively recruiting volunteer lawyers, law students and disability advocates (non-attorneys) to join the team. They also need people who are fluent in American Sign Language (ASL). Prospective volunteers can sign up [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=142129d294&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**GENERAL VOLUNTEER SIGN-UP**
* [Sign-up Link (English) ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f5b5062508&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* [Sign-up Link (Spanish)](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=30d1eeee2b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

**DOWNLOAD VOTE JOE APP**
Get out the vote to friends and family by downloading the [Vote Joe app](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1d35aad00a&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Through the app you can reach out to your community and provide key voting resources. Please encourage those within your networks to download the app to receive reliable voting information from the Biden campaign.

**TEXT BANKS**
* English training - 2020 Victory National Text Team Training! - Sign up [link](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=de6f2d6a0b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Spanish training - Entrenamiento de "Text Mi Gente" (Español) - Sign up[ link](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=aebeb319e7&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Vote Joe Friendbank - Virtual Friend to Friend Outreach Training[ https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/327865/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=60570c0bbf&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

**PHONE BANK TRAINING - New to Phone Banking? Sign up for a Call Crew Training:**
* English - Dem Dialer (Thru-Talk):[ 2020victory.io/callcrewtraining](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8b44732cf3&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Spanish - Entrenamiento de "Llamando Contigo" spanish calling dialer:[ Sign up here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1f74c60801&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

**PHONE BANKS - And then make calls from the comfort of your couch:**
* English - Dem Dialer (Thru Talk):[ https://2020victory.io/makecalls](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=97fe83af20&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Spanish - “Llamando Contigo” spanish language calls:[ Sign up link here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=857c0847dc&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* Bilingual Todos con Biden Weekly Phone Banks - Thursdays at 6:00 PM ET [Register Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=53cf4aea84&e=d6c5c7d7ec)!

**PHONE BANK LINK TREE**
* For a comprehensive list of phone banks by coalition, Please refer to the link tree [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0cc836b0d2&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

**VISIT IWILLVOTE.COM / VOYAVOTAR.COM**
It is the most comprehensive and accurate source of voting information. There is a large team behind this ensuring data is rapidly updated with any changes happening on the ground, like additional polling sites being opened or extended voting hours

The new features on the site help voters learn about their options to participate in the election and make a plan to vote that works for them. [IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=70443fe2a9&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [VoyAVotar.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c0b47704e0&e=d6c5c7d7ec) has launched new features that allow you to make it easier than ever to:
1. Check your registration
2. Register to vote
3. Request a mail ballot
4. Sign up for info on voting in person
5. Find more information about voting in your state

clean_body: He’s leading the fight for Texas. | Friend, Nancy Pelosi bought two Republican congressional seats in Texas in 2018. U.S. Army Captain Wesley Hunt is the GOP nominee to win one of them back in 2020. Polls currently show that his election is tied and within the margin of error. Your last-minute support at the final hour could be what puts him over the top. Nancy Pelosi has admitted in emails to her donors that this seat in Texas could make or break her House majority. That’s why I want to be confident that I did everything I could to help Wesley win this race. In a race this close every dollar makes a difference. I hope Wesley can count on your support to give him the lead in this TIED race. Thank you, Nikki Haley 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Roger Misso
subject: $5 sends 1 new voter to the polls!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members of integrity running for Congress in tough races. One of the services we provide is support for their field campaign programs, affectionately referred to as "GOTV" (Get Out The Vote). This is how campaigns turn all the hard work they've put in into actual ballots cast by real voters.

Field campaigns are not cheap! After analyzing hundreds of campaigns from across the country, our staff teaches that campaigns must raise approximately $5 for every voter they want to turnout. For our average House candidate, that means they'd have to raise $1 million just for their field campaign alone; for our Senate candidates, like MJ Hegar in Texas, it's a staggering $20 million.

As Early Voting begins in earnest in many states, _**we need you now!**_ [_**Can you chip in to boost the field programs of our 11 US Senate and 18 US House candidates?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rCJHs4qs2N08C79BgGciMzJtBkuF01rGmL5ViEsHcR0=/slkRUbYPr8bMZSbpAU7Qv7jHeYWKGdB9SCMZtJ3KtiI=)

**[$5 brings 1 voter to the polls.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rCJHs4qs2N08C79BgGciMzJtBkuF01rGmL5ViEsHcR0=/slkRUbYPr8bMZSbpAU7Qv7jHeYWKGdB9SCMZtJ3KtiI=)**
**[$50 brings 10 voters to the polls.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rCJHs4qs2N08C79BgGciMzJtBkuF01rGmL5ViEsHcR0=/slkRUbYPr8bMZSbpAU7Qv7jHeYWKGdB9SCMZtJ3KtiI=)**
[**$500 brings 100 voters to the polls.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rCJHs4qs2N08C79BgGciMzJtBkuF01rGmL5ViEsHcR0=/slkRUbYPr8bMZSbpAU7Qv7jHeYWKGdB9SCMZtJ3KtiI=)
[**$5,000 brings 1,000 new voters to the polls - and can decide an entire election!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rCJHs4qs2N08C79BgGciMzJtBkuF01rGmL5ViEsHcR0=/slkRUbYPr8bMZSbpAU7Qv7jHeYWKGdB9SCMZtJ3KtiI=)

With 10 days to go, we can have an enormous impact! Thank you so much for helping our veteran and military family candidates WIN!

Fighting hard until Election Day,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/rCJHs4qs2N08C79BgGciMzJtBkuF01rGmL5ViEsHcR0=/Z2_4xAnbS5wFLErUKJsAWTwLABx_UBG8a-kA_nw0LtQ=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rCJHs4qs2N08C79BgGciMzJtBkuF01rGmL5ViEsHcR0=/E8Ek9CCm1LFH-EnsEanDJFC_ihDx2eHx8lZMwpKFP5E=)

subject: my heart just sank
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | My heart just sank to the floor. For the first time -- ever -- I was just outraised by my Republican opponent. I'll repeat that: [**For the first time in history, Republicans have the funds to take this Senate seat from us.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd89/18e32a7f/4b72f502/7b209915/1640116373/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20201024_em_fr_b1_lujan_90_rs&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") [_**I don 't know how else to put this: If I don't close this alarming budget gap -- now -- we could downright lose this Senate race, and our entire shot to flip McConnell's Senate will be over. I refuse to let my opponent snatch this seat from us at the last second. I need 1,397 gifts before tomorrow's End of Week Deadline to close the gap and WIN.
