Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd89/18e32a7f/4b72f502/7b20990d/1640116373/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Cory Booker
subject: Hear me out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
My friend Jacky said I could reach out, folks.
Last night's debate made it clear: this is the most important election of our lifetimes. We only have 10 days left to determine the future of our country and the stakes could not be higher.
**Before I ask if you can chip in to ensure Democrats have the resources to get out the vote and win this election, I hope you 'll hear me out.**
We as a country find ourselves in a moral moment. For the past four years, President Trump and Vice President Pence have spread chaos, hatred, and division across our country, all while failing to properly address the COVID-19 pandemic.
Folks, the stakes of this election are at an all-time high. Donald Trump is a president who has threatened the free press and protesters exercising their First Amendment rights, encouraged foreign interference in our elections, and personally profited off the presidency.
Through his words and actions, he's attacked immigrants, women, Black and brown people, the LGBTQ community, students, seniors, and so many others while completely obliterating our democratic norms and basic decency along the way.
Everything from health care coverage for millions of people, to reproductive freedom guaranteed by Roe v. Wade, to our bedrock environmental protections, to our most basic right to vote, and so much more are on the line in this election.
Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have been saying, "This is a battle for the soul of our nation." And they're right.
That's why I've been working so hard to make sure that this campaign and others have the resources needed to win this November, so we can take back control of the Senate and remove Trump and Pence from the White House for good.
**[With so much on the line and with only 10 days to go until Election Day, will you split a contribution between my campaign and my good friend Jacky Rosen's work to flip the Senate to support us in this fight?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201023-cory-booker?refcode=em201023i_4692&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I appreciate anything and everything you do to stand up and fight for what's right in this moral moment for our nation.
\-- Cory

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201023-cory-booker?refcode=em201023i_4692&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d8437/4fbb2af3/200dbf2d/5e81bf10/486661367/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.

Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126

All three of these women running in Iowa have some of the closest races across the entire country. That's why we're teaming up with Cindy Axne and Abby Finkenauer again for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the critical resources needed at this final stage of the election.

**[Donate whatever you can so we can work together to build a united, blue Iowa.](https://act.myngp.com/el/vOfs844ncEVfYcx_-HeBX9f7GJecOLrsPMGW9cEIkqE=/0P_LLhEBee_lVT8NH14jdyyJ08V6I5HS0Yp9s92bRhE=?refcode=201024-email)**

clean_body: | | | These 3 women running for Iowa House seats are coming down to the wire: | ****** All three of these women running in Iowa have some of the closest races across the entire country. That's why we're teaming up with Cindy Axne and Abby Finkenauer again for a joint fundraiser to supply all our campaigns with the critical resources needed at this final stage of the election. Massive amounts of national donor groups are flooding Iowa with dark money in an effort to dominate the airwaves in the final weeks of the election. These races are projected to be won by razor-thin margins. We need your help to get voters to the polls to send true Iowan values to Washington! We are fighting as hard as we can in the final stages of this election to reach as many voters as possible! Washington special interest groups want to run away with these elections and put in place extreme, divisive politicians who will put their party before the people of Iowa. Thanks for all your support, Rita Hart for Congress ****Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!** | **** Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. name: John Hickenlooper for Senate
subject: This might've just cost us this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Republican groups are launching another round of nasty attacks to sink our campaign in these final days.
We wish we didn't have to send this email, everyone, but we just made a tough decision that could make-or-break this campaign.
To be blunt, we weren't expecting our fundraising to dip as much as it has. Right now, we do not have enough money to launch our final media buy of this election.
To make matters worse, we just got intel that outside Republican groups are launching another round of nasty attacks to sink our campaign in these final days.
The sheer number of attacks directed at our campaign has been alarming. So, our manager just authorized the launch of a new ad to fight back -- **even though we don 't have the money in our budget.**
Look, we're willing to bet grassroots supporters like you can get us back on track and ensure we have the financial resources to fight off the GOP's attacks before it's too late. That's why Senator Hassan said we should reach out.
[**Please, rush $3 or anything you can to help us flip Colorado 's Senate seat blue. clean_body: Republican groups are launching another round of nasty attacks to sink our campaign in these final days. We wish we didn't have to send this email, everyone, but we just made a tough decision that could make-or-break this campaign. To be blunt, we weren't expecting our fundraising to dip as much as it has. Right now, we do not have enough money to launch our final media buy of this election. To make matters worse, we just got intel that outside Republican groups are launching another round of nasty attacks to sink our campaign in these final days. The sheer number of attacks directed at our campaign has been alarming. So, our manager just authorized the launch of a new ad to fight back -- even though we don 't have the money in our budget. Look, we're willing to bet grassroots supporters like you can get us back on track and ensure we have the financial resources to fight off the GOP's attacks before it's too late. body:
| |

| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTM5Mjc0OTY1NTAzNzEwNDkyJmM9djB5MiZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzgzNDgxNzUmZD12Mmc0ajRx.t1xpBxRPvkg0iVOvxQYWuQVIJwVEZHJe1PJJv-bl8kU)

| [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTM5Mjc0OTY1NTAzNzEwNDkyJmM9djB5MiZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzgzNDgxNzgmZD1mNGU5djZk.ivLtQFg6-llbrLioU1SrtKYG1HL6_KQY5lOVkHFXb-8)
---
---
| |
---
| Friends, In case you missed it, last week the UNH survey center released a poll showing that the race for the NH State Senate is too close to call**.** We are VERY close to winning back a Republican Majority and the Democrats know it -- and they're getting desperate. **My race in District 8 is going to be one of the _tightest, most heavily contested _State Senate races, not only in New Hampshire, but in the entire country. **If we want to win back the majority, we need to hold this seat! That's why I am asking for your help. Will you help me fight back against the Democrats' negative, attack ads during the closing week by chipping in $10 or $25 to my campaign? >>>[Follow this secure link to donate online to my campaign! ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTM5Mjc0OTY1NTAzNzEwNDkyJmM9djB5MiZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzgzNDgxODEmZD16MHUzczlj.ytS44OhVVwdwSwixk98QL3Mm7Sjq1lIMPXBmQticcQk)
The Democrats have gone all in on my race. Last week, my opponent, Jenn Alford-Teaster, _DOUBLED_ her advertising buy locally. **She is an ultra-liberal that supported Elizabeth Warren in the Presidential Primary and is now trying to portray herself as a "moderate." ** She has managed to raise a lot of money from Hollywood elites and New York City liberals -- while my donations have all come from good Granite Staters like you.****

body:
Our volunteers are out in full force today... amplifying our message and winning over voters.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398852-939380-5261289-00c36faf9c-17d26d6a37)
Patriot,

[**Will you do your part too, by pitching in $10 right away to help this campaign continue to mobilize?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398852-939380-5261288-f6e6e9a2b9-17d26d6a37)

There’s so much at stake in this race... because I’m running against one of the worst leftist Swamp Creatures in Washington: Lois Frankel.

>From denigrating our police, cheering on Antifa, and supporting the left’s job-crushing “green” agenda, **Lois Frankel has _always_ put politics and party before our nation**.

That’s what our incredible team is telling voters today. **But we’re running out of time.**

Weekends are critical for this campaign, because it means more volunteers hitting the pavement, and more face time with voters. We have just two left.

[**Will you help us make the most of the time we have left, by pitching in $10 right away?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398852-939380-5261288-f6e6e9a2b9-17d26d6a37)

[**Help us mobilize and win by chipping in $10, $25, or even $50 now.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-398852-939380-5261287-16c935838a-17d26d6a37)

Thanks,

Laura Loomer

From denigrating our police, cheering on Antifa, and supporting the left’s job-crushing “green” agenda, Lois Frankel has always put politics and party before our nation. That’s what our incredible team is telling voters today. But we’re running out of time. Weekends are critical for this campaign, because it means more volunteers hitting the pavement, and more face time with voters. We have just two left. Thanks, Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Laura Loomer for Congress Inc 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Bob Fertik - Democrats.com
subject: Early voting in 2020 is already smashing records
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100163430.546393.273&gen=1).
| [](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163430.546393.273&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16026)
---
| Friend, This election couldn't be more important. State election officials have already received a record number of vote-by-mail ballots. Across the country, ballots from Democratic voters are outpacing Republicans . . . so far. All year, we've been encouraging millions of Democrats to cast their ballot and take out Trump. Now we're asking you: What's your plan to vote? Vote-by-mail: I have requested my ballot Vote-by-mail: I have already submitted my ballot Vote-by-mail: I have my ballot and am planning to submit it Voting early: I have already voted in person Voting early: I plan to vote early in person Election Day: I will vote in person on Tuesday, November 3 I do not intend to vote in this vital election *By answering this survey, you are subscribing to our newsletter. When you click 'Submit & Join', you will leave this page and see the results of this survey so far. [If you are having trouble, click here.](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100163430.546393.273&gen=1)
* * *

If you haven't already voted, you can find out how to vote and make your plan to vote by visiting our partners at **[PlanToVote.org](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163430.546393.273&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16028).** There are a lot of voting options this year - forward this email and ask your friends and family how they are prepared to vote in this important election.
We really appreciate your participation in this survey, as we launch our campaign to **identify every Democratic voter we can and make sure they vote in November.** If you'd like to help us organize, [please join our Facebook community](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163430.546393.273&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16030). Thanks for all you do! | ****| **Bob Fertik, President**
---|---
_Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace. We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. Please join us at_ _[Democrats.com](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100163430.546393.273&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16031)_ _!_
### E-mail Updates
**Yes, please periodically send me e-mail updates.*** [ ](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=subscribe&gpiv=2100163430.546393.273&gen=1) *By subscribing to my
e-mail updates, you are authorizing me to send regular e-mail updates from my office to your e-mail account.
---
